title: 6 Months Operations Assistant - Automotive ($2800)  #NJN
description:
Redhill
6 Months Contract - extendable/ convertible
9am to 6pm (Mon - Fri)
10am to 1pm (Alt Sun)

Showroom Vehicles

  • Perform daily checks to ensure showroom cars are in good condition and properly parked
  • Coordinate and maintain accurate records of the movement and transfer of vehicles between locations
  • Ensure showroom cars display correct spec sheets and model plates
  • Complete proper vehicles handover checks and documentation
  • Arrange showroom cars for workshops or vendors servicing when required

Sold & Delivery Vehicles

  • Ensure sold cars are parked at designated areas with proper signage
  • Send vehicles for STA inspection/Agent/External vendors
  • Create and follow up on job entries in Salesforce/Planner
  • Coordinate delivery schedules closely with Sales Consultants
  • Ensure vehicles are thoroughly checked and detailed before customer delivery
  • Do tyre/battery checklist
  • Accountability of Delivery Packs (2 master keys, Owner Manual and Service Booklet)

Other Responsibilities

  • Communicate and coordinate with stakeholders
  • Support and participate in sales events as required
  • Generate Purchase Order amount accurately and promptly for superior approval
  • Maintain the accuracy of vehicle locations
  • To assist in monthly stock take

Requirements

  • Class 3 driving license is required
  • Minimum GCE N Level or equivalent with 2 years of relevant experience
  • Proficient in Basic Microsoft Office tools



Jessica Nguyen Huynh Thanh Truc

CEI Reg. No. R23113787

EA License No. 99C4599

We regret that only shortlisted candidates will be notified.

postedCompany.description:
Established since 1996, Recruit Express has emerged as the leading staffing solutions provider that has set a proven track record for matching the right people to the right organization within the shortest time. With our vast network of resources, extensive databases and defined recruitment processes, we have been successfully bridging talented job seekers of the highest calibre to employers who only want the best in their teams.


In our relentless pursuit of excellent service, we have adopted best practices and dynamic growth strategies in expanding our operations across the Asia Pacific regions: We have offices in Singapore, Sydney, Hong Kong, Kuala Lumpur, Taipei, Shanghai, Beijing, Tokyo and Bangkok.

With 400 permanent committed consultants from various professional backgrounds and disciplines, we make a difference by delivering top-notch services to our clients and candidates alike.
postedCompany.name: RECRUIT EXPRESS PTE LTD
